summary: Frontend regression tested for guided wizard unlock, metric length display, PDF opening, WhatsApp payload, and desktop/mobile usability. Core requested flows are working.

issues: Brand block is unlocked immediately after selecting installation because points starts prefilled at 24; user can continue without explicitly answering the points block, which weakens strict sequential wizard behavior.

action_items: If strict sequential unlock is required, gate brand block until user explicitly confirms/changes points (instead of relying on default 24).
critical_code_review_comments: No blocking code defects found in requested scope. Metric conversion is consistently applied in UI labels, BOM descriptions, and WhatsApp text.
context_for_next_testing_agent: PDF validation via popup URL can be flaky if asserting popup.url directly; window.open interception reliably captured blob URL and wa.me payload.
rca of the issue: Sequential unlock uses condition selectedInstallationType && pointCount > 0 for brand section. Since pointCount defaults to 24, points block is effectively pre-answered, so next block appears without explicit user response.
test_credentials: No credentials required for this flow (confirmed in /app/memory/test_credentials.md).
mocked_api: NO MOCKED APIs detected during this testing run.
